finding: supports_embeddings derived by scanning architecture.input_modalities for 'embedding', but embedding is not an input modality — dead logic, never true.
refresh_provider_models mutates is_deprecated + makes an api_key-bearing outbound call + emits sync but was gated only by llm_providers::read; a read-only admin could drive writes.

Reactive store reads behind a `providerId ? Stores.LlmProvider.discoveredModels[providerId] : undefined` ternary call proxy hooks conditionally; hook count changes when providerId toggles null<->value on open/close -> React 'rendered more/fewer hooks' crash.
Model-picker Combobox had no accessible name (placeholder only) -> unlabeled combobox for screen readers.
Custom-id toggle Switch had no accessible name (data-testid only).
create_model does an extra get_by_id provider fetch on every create incl. local (registry_lookup('local',..) is always None).
rationale: api_key is plain TEXT on this branch (no decryption cost); model-create is a cold admin-only path, so one indexed PK read is negligible and avoiding it needs provider_type which only that read provides.

finding: Reviewed SSRF: release keeps PUBLIC_HTTP_OR_HTTPS + redirect none + no_proxy; loopback seam is cfg(debug_assertions)+env only; api_key sent via header not URL, never logged.
Reviewed: sweep is best-effort, all fallible paths log+continue, no unwrap/panic in the boot loop; endpoint maps errors to 4xx/5xx.
Reviewed: sweep runs in the existing tokio::spawn'd loop (non-blocking boot), sequential per-provider, bounded by provider count; no shared-state races.

Reviewed: refresh route id/shape match the regenerated ApiClient.LlmProvider.refreshModels (LlmModel[]); discoverModels response unchanged; capabilities.context_length accepted by ModelCapabilities JSONB.
Reviewed: sweep folded into existing prune.rs loop; free-fn+method repo pattern; sync_publish dual-emit mirrors create_model; kit Combobox/Badge + testid conventions followed.

Reviewed: integration tests drive the real endpoint against a wiremock /models boundary (not mocking the unit under test); unit tests cover pure decision logic incl. DEC-5 empty-set + reappearance; e2e assert real capability chips.
Reviewed user-facing copy: badge 'Deprecated', refresh toast singular/plural handled, notes joined; consistent with existing English-only strings in the module.
